fields.name: identifier
fields.description: The unique identifier for the integration

fields.name: _environmentId
fields.description: The ID of the associated environment

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: The provider ID for the integration

fields.name: channel
fields.description: The channel type for the integration. Not required for agent-kind integrations.

fields.name: kind
fields.description: Distinguishes delivery integrations from agent-runtime integrations. Defaults to "delivery". Agent integrations do not require a channel.

fields.name: active
fields.description: If the integration is active, the validation on the credentials field will run

fields.name: check
fields.description: Flag to check the integration status
